engines_unavailable_reason: OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, SERPAPI_API_KEY, PERPLEXITY_API_KEY not configured in scheduled-task env
sampling: weighted: compliance(3) + assessment(2) + partner(2) + industry(2) + comparison(1) + commercial(2) + trust(1) + local(1) = 14

results.notes: SB 26-189 / SB 189 framing confirmed across competitor results. No SMB-tier authority pages.
ComplianceIQ dominates this query — Engine 1 direct competitor. /compliance-assessment pillar still doesn't exist on sayfeai.com.
TrustLayer Risk Matrix is the 5-minute-promise leader; needs same H1 + FAQ on /compliance-assessment when built.
All top results lead with downloadable template — /compliance/ai-policy-template pillar needs a one-click free download.

NEW DEVELOPMENT — Mondaq + ISMS articles surface the EU Digital Omnibus provisional deal pushing high-risk Annex III obligations from Aug 2 2026 to Dec 2 2027 (transparency obligations unchanged). Patched today across llms.txt + llms-full.txt + blog/ai-compliance-colorado-eu-small-business-2026.html.
ConnectWise + ManagedServicesJournal + ChannelPro dominate. Sayfeai has zero MSP-channel content. Pillar gap — Engine 2 alignment requires dedicated MSP page (consider /partners/msp).

Think Technologies and Codestone repeat from 5/19. Cloudwerx newly surfaces via ARN. Patched openai-smb-partner.html with competitor-displacement FAQ explicitly naming Think Technologies / Codestone / Cloudwerx / Madewell.

HIPAAJournal + OpenAI direct dominate. Existing /blog/chatgpt-healthcare-hipaa-2026 not surfacing — needs dedicated entity-clarity strengthening + ChatGPT-for-Healthcare-vs-Business comparison table (defer to next run; not patched today).
GC AI page uses 'Heppner' case-name vs. our 'Rakoff' framing — patched /industries/legal.html to include 'Heppner / Rakoff' alias in body + FAQPage JSON-LD.
tactiq remains the top citation. Yesterday's content engine flagged adding Workspace Agents differentiator FAQ to this page — deferred to next run (not in scope of today's diagnoses).
OpenAI direct + ChatGPT.com dominate. SMB-partner-priced angle not surfacing — /pricing competing on volume of facts, not entity authority.

Think Technologies wins again. PwC (CNBC / VentureBeat) crowds the reseller term. Patch today: competitor-displacement FAQ on /openai-smb-partner.html naming Think Technologies / Codestone / Cloudwerx / Madewell — first time we have explicit comparative authority on this page.

Strong local competitive set — Josh The AI Guy, Chris N. Cheetham-West, PennComp, Ademero. /about LocalBusiness JSON-LD shipped 5/19 but takes time to be picked up. No new patches today — wait one cycle to measure post-LocalBusiness lift before further /about edits.
HIPAAJournal dominates trust queries. Our /blog/chatgpt-healthcare-hipaa-2026 needs entity-clarity + comparison table in a future run.

new_competitors_auto_detected_note: Cloudwerx + Codestone + Think Technologies appeared in 2 queries each in this run; none crossed the 3+ threshold. Seed file target_competitor fields for openai-partner-for-consultants and openai-smb-partner already set to Think Technologies / openai-smb / openai partnerintake from prior runs.
pillar_handoffs_open_queue: ai-compliance-assessment -> /compliance-assessment (highest priority — direct competitor trycomplianceiq.com wins)
